title: Fleet Intelligence (disambiguation)
content:
'''Fleet Intelligence''' can refer to:

==[[Canon]]==
*[[Fleet Intelligence|'''Fleet Intelligence''']], an intelligence branch of the [[New Republic]]

==[[Star Wars Legends|''Star Wars'' Legends]]==
*[[Fleet Intelligence (Alliance to Restore the Republic)|'''Fleet Intelligence''']], a branch of the [[Alliance Fleet/Legends|Alliance Fleet]]
*'''[[Galactic Alliance Fleet Intelligence]]''', the intelligence service of the [[Galactic Alliance Defense Force]]
*'''[[Imperial Navy Intelligence]]''', also known as '''Fleet Intelligence'''
*'''[[New Republic Fleet Intelligence]]''', the intelligence department of the [[New Republic Defense Fleet/Legends|New Republic Defense Fleet]]

{{Disambig}}
